programme.desc:
At 2.4m and offshore, Ribeira will be rideable, assuming you enjoy a good beating now and then.
🌊 Swell: 2.4m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 18.0km/h ENE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 38.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.2m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
With that 2.2m swell and offshore breeze, there'll be a few rideable ones out there for those still capable of paddling.
🌊 Swell: 2.2m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h NNE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 20.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 2.2m and with that wind, today's more about surviving than thriving out there.
🌊 Swell: 2.2m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h NNE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 20.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 2.2m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 2.2m and onshore wind, it'll be a good workout paddling against the slop today.

programme.title: 🌊 2.0m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that crosswind and 2.0m swell, today's Ribeira d'Ilhas will either be surprisingly alright, or a total washing machine.
🌊 Swell: 2.0m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 41.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.9m
